{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143202C0D080CD2B375EEE032C"}"},"total":39},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6854594624825163776","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节还不错，很紧凑，场面很大，铺的也很开，法和情的问题应该一直是案件发生的最大冲突点，梅姐说的对，她不是天生的罪犯，只是遭受到了那样的事情，让她放不下也过不去，所以她一边杀人一边自责，文章题材还是比较新颖的，最难测的是人心，所以心理学的知识真的很神奇，用好了是破案的工具，用不好是作案的工具，端看你这个使用人的人心是什么样的，文章不只是让我们看一个案件的真破过程，也是在剖析人性以及道德，最让我感觉鸡肋的欧阳和邢娜的感情，没给小说加分，反而让人不喜欢邢娜这个角色，冲动感情用事让邢娜这个警察显得很不专业，不知道是不是有删减，没看到中间他俩有什么，后期就在一起了。。。整体来说还是不错的一个小说，很完整而且引人入胜"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1595959704,"group_id":"6623892601659460612","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"做三观正的理智读者！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3K0GH9clADdQ0b1F4otV4P3EL3UeCfrXmcDrzWau1Dv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/00fede5fe1b94ee1a2205e4dae9c6754~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615908&x-signature=N4104PvGNJCwUjFQ4guXsvaaB5E%3D","user_id":"2669228196629912","user_name":"团团和嘟嘟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2669228196629912","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1644765383,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6623892601659460612","book_info":{"abstract":"警校老师欧阳双杰在深夜11点遭遇车祸，肇事者却在车内割腕自杀。紧接着市里接二连三地发生命案，所有的迹象表明他们都是自杀。然而这一切看似巧合，却又让人无法相信。随着调查的深入，欧阳双杰发现他们的生活竟然在25年前出现过重合。究竟这些人在25年前干了些什么?是复仇还是内心积攒已久的愧疚让他们无法面对而自杀。
紧接着越来越多的人深陷其中---死者的女儿，老婆和情人。涉及家族的荣誉、个人的利益还有当事人心里面不可告人的秘密。直到终欧阳双杰才明白，原来凶手就隐藏在身边冷漠地注视着周围发生的一切……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/79f3bc66d943ba31067d018537548165~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨绿青苔","author_id":"","book_id":"6623892601659460612","book_name":"连环罪：心理有诡","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082030","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6624086246996050435","read_count":"262","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"239407"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"12","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/79f3bc66d943ba31067d018537548165~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258722&x-signature=65%2FKUcIpKGV9Vf2fWIkrPzZpMys%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143202C0D080CD2B375EEE032C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":30335,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30335,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3008},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6819893788048654348","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，精彩。情节环环相扣，文采也很不错，而且这个字数很适合空闲时间不太多的人。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1587880263,"group_id":"6623892601659460612","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2ZJ5ierRDt4FpU1GksQW2QIieM42RBWgX6hYKH75Lo/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1dc6fdbafd154ea9ad05d0ab812f3698~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621031&x-signature=GHAM2XbJ9n7Wqkb1c11gllps1%2Bw%3D","user_id":"4124960438355950","user_name":"予诺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4124960438355950","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6623892601659460612","book_info":{"abstract":"警校老师欧阳双杰在深夜11点遭遇车祸，肇事者却在车内割腕自杀。紧接着市里接二连三地发生命案，所有的迹象表明他们都是自杀。然而这一切看似巧合，却又让人无法相信。随着调查的深入，欧阳双杰发现他们的生活竟然在25年前出现过重合。究竟这些人在25年前干了些什么?是复仇还是内心积攒已久的愧疚让他们无法面对而自杀。
紧接着越来越多的人深陷其中---死者的女儿，老婆和情人。涉及家族的荣誉、个人的利益还有当事人心里面不可告人的秘密。直到终欧阳双杰才明白，原来凶手就隐藏在身边冷漠地注视着周围发生的一切……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/79f3bc66d943ba31067d018537548165~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨绿青苔","author_id":"","book_id":"6623892601659460612","book_name":"连环罪：心理有诡","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082030","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6624086246996050435","read_count":"262","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"239407"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"12","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/79f3bc66d943ba31067d018537548165~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258722&x-signature=65%2FKUcIpKGV9Vf2fWIkrPzZpMys%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143202C0D080CD2B375EEE032C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":14454},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374436432184099611","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的剧情真是扑朔迷离！作者把每个案件都设计得十分巧妙，让我一直在猜测凶手到底是谁。而且书中的角色都很鲜活，他们的经历和性格都让我产生了共鸣。我尤其对沈兰的悲痛感同身受，她的坚强也让我十分钦佩。这让我想起了自己生活中的一些困难时刻，我也从她身上学到了面对挫折时的勇气。真是一本精彩的小说！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716124436,"group_id":"6623892601659460612","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyKZRoLYP4cifm9M8DvIuprp7iyWG55yFpv4Vf+rhnWF","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2544742766485098","user_name":"喜欢巨蜥科的呼延道主"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2544742766485098","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6623892601659460612","book_info":{"abstract":"警校老师欧阳双杰在深夜11点遭遇车祸，肇事者却在车内割腕自杀。紧接着市里接二连三地发生命案，所有的迹象表明他们都是自杀。然而这一切看似巧合，却又让人无法相信。随着调查的深入，欧阳双杰发现他们的生活竟然在25年前出现过重合。究竟这些人在25年前干了些什么?是复仇还是内心积攒已久的愧疚让他们无法面对而自杀。
紧接着越来越多的人深陷其中---死者的女儿，老婆和情人。涉及家族的荣誉、个人的利益还有当事人心里面不可告人的秘密。直到终欧阳双杰才明白，原来凶手就隐藏在身边冷漠地注视着周围发生的一切……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/79f3bc66d943ba31067d018537548165~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨绿青苔","author_id":"","book_id":"6623892601659460612","book_name":"连环罪：心理有诡","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082030","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6624086246996050435","read_count":"262","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"239407"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"12","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/79f3bc66d943ba31067d018537548165~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258722&x-signature=65%2FKUcIpKGV9Vf2fWIkrPzZpMys%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143202C0D080CD2B375EEE032C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7500,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":332},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"6623892601659460612","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count
